metadata.title:
THE COUNCIL MUST


NOW TAKE A HAND

pages.raw_text:
Public demand today is that the city council take the
further building of the Monroe street bridge hand and
either order the awarding of the balance Of the bridge by
contract discharge the engineers in supervision Of the
work and demand that the mayor place competent in
their stead


mental failure its hands compared with which the
Sprague avenue fill will be toy Further tolerance
OF child play by the city engineers office in the building
OF the Monroe street bridge should be terminated The
bridge Of the biggest undertakings of its kind ever
and the plan heretofore pursued of placing
engineers in charge of the work will bankrupt the city
if it is continued.


The city engineers office estimates the loss caused by
the collapse at $3.50 Former Chief Foreman of Con-


tructon Farney says that the loss is nearer $6OOOO


Councmen are being appealed to all sides to take
the bridge matter in hand and do something Action should
be taken at the meeting next Tuesday night.
